visual_description: The woman with long dark hair, wearing a blue jacket over a turtleneck, stands partially behind a white tiled wall, holding a knife in her right hand. An axe is thrown and embeds itself in the wall beside her, causing her to recoil and raise her left hand to her face. Her mouth is open wide and her eyes are wide as she looks toward the source of the impact.
audio_description: A high-pitched scream is heard, followed by the thud of the axe striking the wall.
